units.lean_file_body:
theorem det_transpose' (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) : Aᵀ.det = A.det :=
by
  simpa using Matrix.det_transpose A

theorem det_triangular (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) (h : A.BlockTriangular id) : A.det = ∏ i, A i i :=
  Matrix.det_of_upperTriangular h
notes: Uses Matrix.det_of_upperTriangular for upper triangular; lower triangular case follows by transpose.

units.lean_file_body:
theorem det_permute_rows (τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) :
    (A.submatrix τ id).det = (Equiv.Perm.sign τ : K) * A.det :=
  Matrix.det_permute τ A

theorem det_permute_cols (τ : Equiv.Perm (Fin n)) (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) :
    (A.submatrix id τ).det = (Equiv.Perm.sign τ : K) * A.det :=
  Matrix.det_permute' τ A
notes: Uses Matrix.det_permute and Matrix.det_permute' from Mathlib.
